title: Platform Manifest
description: Records the Morpheus platform bootstrap state for a project: profile, hardware, project type, installed modules with versions, and provenance timestamps. Every Morpheus-scaffolded project carries a platform-manifest.json at its root.

platform_version.description: Semantic version of the Morpheus platform at initialization.

profile.description: Ergonomic profile used to scaffold the project. Exactly one of the five Morpheus profiles.

detected_hardware.description: Hardware and OS facts detected at init time.

os.description: Operating system family (e.g. darwin, linux, win32).

shell.description: Shell detected at init time (e.g. zsh, bash, pwsh).

project_type.description: Project classification inferred at init time.

modules.description: Installed modules keyed by module name with pinned semver version.

governance.description: Agent Governance Operating Model fields. Maps to the enterprise Agent Development Lifecycle (ADLC) and AI Service Intake. Every Morpheus-scaffolded project declares a governance block; production-bound projects must set risk_tier and agent_registry_id before merge to the default branch.

risk_tier.description: Four-tier risk classification per the enterprise Agent Governance model. 1 = internal/experimental, 2 = internal/production, 3 = customer-facing/non-regulated, 4 = customer-facing/regulated or high-impact.

agent_registry_id.description: Identifier for this project in the enterprise Agent Registry surfaced by the CoE Portal. Assigned after intake approval.

intake_record_id.description: AI Service Intake record identifier produced when the initial spec was submitted to the CoE Portal.

review_track.description: Review track assigned at intake time, based on risk_tier scoring.

kill_switch.description: Containment configuration. Every agent project must declare how it can be halted.

mechanism.description: How this agent is halted in an emergency (e.g. feature_flag, env_var, api_disable, deploy_rollback).

owner.description: Email of the on-call owner with authority to trigger the kill switch.

reference.description: Pointer to the kill-switch runbook or feature-flag key.

decommission.description: Planned decommissioning metadata. Required when the agent has a known sunset path.

successor_agent_registry_id.description: Registry ID of the replacement agent, if any.

cost_tags.description: Instrumentation for the AI ROI Measurement Framework. Connects operating cost to a value hypothesis so each production agent can be issued a value card.

cost_center.description: Business cost center charged for this agent's operating cost.

platforms.description: AI platforms this agent consumes (e.g. azure-openai, anthropic, bedrock, foundry).

primary_models.description: Primary model identifiers in production use.

expected_monthly_usd.description: Expected monthly operating cost in USD at initialization time.

value_hypothesis.description: One-sentence statement of the measurable business outcome this agent is designed to produce.

value_confidence.description: Confidence label for value measurement, per the enterprise ROI framework.

initialized_by.description: Email of the user who initialized the project.

last_updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent manifest update.

cost_tags.value_hypothesis: Reduces RFP draft cycle time by 30% across Gov sales.
